title: Hemigramma pentagonalis
taxonomy: Hemigramma pentagonalis is classified within the phylum Chordata, class Amphibia, and order Caudata. This classification reflects its characteristics as a type of salamander. It is a species of newt, with the family being Salamandridae. Hemigramma pentagonalis is a genus found in Europe. The taxonomy of this species is under the kingdom Animalia.
